hero.description: Homes was built on a single premise — property buyers in Lucknow deserved better. Better information, better legal clarity, and an advisor who actually works for them.

story.title: A Consultancy Built on Relationships, Not Commissions
story.paragraphOne: Homes operates as a strategic intermediary and brokerage — connecting prospective homebuyers and institutional investors with residential assets developed by trusted builders across Uttar Pradesh.
story.paragraphTwo: We serve three fundamental needs: helping buyers find the right property, arranging site visits at their convenience, and providing fair, unbiased home loan guidance through partner banks.
story.paragraphThree: Our office is in Sushant Golf City, Lucknow — the heart of the city's most active residential corridors. Every property we list, we know personally.

values.oneDesc: Pricing, RERA IDs, stamp duty estimates, and legal clearance status — every listing is fully documented.
values.twoDesc: We earn only when the right property matches the right buyer. No pressure, no inflated listings.
values.threeDesc: We list only RERA-registered projects or verified resale properties with clear title. Compliance is non-negotiable.
values.fourDesc: We work for the buyer, not the builder. Every recommendation is made with your long-term interest in mind.

team.founderBio: With over a decade of experience in Uttar Pradesh real estate, Maneesh has guided hundreds of families and investors to the right property. Director at Shalu Homes Pvt. Ltd. and ESOS Tech LLP.
team.advisoryBio: Our advisory team specialises in residential plots, high-rise apartments, and villa developments across Lucknow's fastest-growing corridors.
